note: Re-run after fixing tests/stress.c (see commit f309e07). The prior 2026-07-12 run reported 'corruption in region 0' on every run; that was a test-harness false positive, not a driver bug -- the shadow buffer assumed the region started zeroed, but basic_test's earlier O_DIRECT writes at offsets 0/1MiB/2MiB (inside thread 0's region) left real data there before stress ran. Bytes the randomized writes never happened to touch again mismatched the zeroed shadow. The old 3.762/3.662/3.605 MiB/s figures from that run were never valid throughput numbers and are superseded by this run.
